feelings.description: Listen to your body — it always has something to tell you!
feelings.placeholder: e.g. I felt satisfied after lunch but a little heavy after dinner...
feelings.title: How did you feel after eating?

history.empty: No entries yet. Complete your first food diary to see it here!
history.subtitle: Your past entries

intro.description: Tracking what you eat helps you understand your body better — what gives you energy, what makes you feel heavy, and where you can make simple improvements. This is a judgment-free zone. Just be honest and enjoy the process!
intro.subtitle: Small steps to big health changes!
intro.title: Welcome to your Food Diary

meals.description: Log each meal or snack below. Even a rough note counts!
meals.title: What did you eat today?

reflection.encouragement: Every entry you make brings you one step closer to a healthier, happier you. Keep showing up — consistency is the real secret!
reflection.question: What's one thing you'd like to eat better tomorrow?
reflection.title: Great job completing today's log!
